opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face is completely on fire. It's bright red, burning, and covered in these painful whitehead spots that popped up after I drank wine in the sun yesterday.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A burning red facial flare with pustules after wine and sun — I'm worried it's a face infection.

symptom_narrative.onset: acute flare over 24h after sun + alcohol, on a background of facial redness/flushing
symptom_narrative.character: burning, stinging central facial redness with red bumps and small pustules
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: visible tiny blood vessels; pustules but no blackheads/whiteheads (comedones); no eye symptoms; no fever

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: chronic facial redness and flushing triggered by heat/alcohol

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: sun exposure and alcohol (wine) triggered this flare

communication_style.typical_message_style: distressed about the burning and appearance

objective_data_offered.value: bright red central face (cheeks/nose/chin) with visible tiny blood vessels, and lots of small red bumps and pustules but no blackheads/whiteheads; no scaling; not hot/hard or sharply bordered
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate for induration or examine eyes closely
